# terrible_community_general_memset_zone_record (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) The address for this record (can be IP or text string depending on record type).
- `api_key` (String) The API key obtained from the Memset control panel.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `type` (String) The type of DNS record to create.
- `zone` (String) The name of the zone to which to add the record to.

### Optional

- `priority` (Number) `SRV` and `TXT` record priority, in the range 0 > 999 (inclusive).
- `record` (String) The subdomain to create.
- `relative` (Boolean) If set then the current domain is added onto the address field for `CNAME`, `MX`, `NS` and `SRV`record types.
- `state` (String) Indicates desired state of resource.
- `ttl` (Number) The record's TTL in seconds (will inherit zone's TTL if not explicitly set). This must be a valid int from https://www.memset.com/apidocs/methods_dns.html#dns.zone_record_create.

### Read-Only

- `memset_api` (String) Record info from the Memset API.
